steps.description: Wait for composer textbox to appear

steps.js_code: (el, b64) => { if (!b64) return 'no_image'; const byteChars = atob(b64); const byteNums = new Array(byteChars.length); for (let i = 0; i < byteChars.length; i++) { byteNums[i] = byteChars.charCodeAt(i); } const byteArray = new Uint8Array(byteNums); const blob = new Blob([byteArray], { type: 'image/png' }); const file = new File([blob], 'image.png', { type: 'image/png' }); const dt = new DataTransfer(); dt.items.add(file); const pasteEvent = new ClipboardEvent('paste', { bubbles: true, cancelable: true, clipboardData: dt }); el.dispatchEvent(pasteEvent); return 'pasted'; }
steps.description: Paste image via ClipboardEvent (skipped if no image_b64 variable)
Wait for post to process (Facebook can be slow)
Navigate to activity log (posts in strict chronological order, newest first)
Wait for activity log to load

steps.js_code: () => { const links = document.querySelectorAll('a[href]'); for (const a of links) { const h = a.href; if (h.includes('profile.php?') || h.includes('/allactivity') || h.endsWith('/me')) continue; if (h.includes('/posts/') || h.includes('pfbid') || h.includes('story_fbid') || h.includes('/permalink')) { if (!h.includes('comment_id')) return h; const clean = h.split('&comment_id=')[0].split('&__cft__')[0].split('&__tn__')[0]; return clean; } } return null; }
steps.description: Extract newest post URL from activity log (first post link = most recent)
Fallback: navigate to profile if activity log didn't yield a URL

steps.js_code: () => { const html = document.body.innerHTML; const matches = [...html.matchAll(/pfbid[a-zA-Z0-9]{20,}/g)]; if (matches.length === 0) return null; const idMatch = document.URL.match(/id=(\d+)/); const uid = idMatch ? idMatch[1] : ''; return 'https://www.facebook.com/permalink.php?story_fbid=' + matches[0][0] + (uid ? '&id=' + uid : ''); }
steps.description: Last resort: extract pfbid from profile page innerHTML
